hero.headline: UPES Online MBA in Digital Business: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) Online MBA with a Digital Business specialisation. NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, UGC-DEB approved. E-Commerce and Digital Business Models, Digital Innovation and Transformation, Digital Consumer Experience, Social Media Strategy, Emerging Technologies in Business, Digital Business Strategy, and Cybersecurity for Managers in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: UPES Online MBA Digital Business: NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, fees Rs 1,75,000 (Year 1: Rs 95,000 / Year 2: Rs 80,000), zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month. Digital-first MBA curriculum with E-Commerce, Digital Innovation, Digital Consumer Experience, Social Media Strategy, Emerging Technologies, Digital Business Strategy, and Cybersecurity for Managers.

about.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Digital Business is offered by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies, Dehradun. UPES holds NAAC A accreditation, NIRF #45 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #36 in Management (2025). The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The Digital Business specialisation delivers Sem 3-4 subjects built around technology-led business models and digital transformation leadership. Sem 3 covers E-Commerce and Digital Business Models, Digital Innovation and Transformation, Digital Consumer Experience, Social Media Strategy and Analytics, and Emerging Technologies in Business. Sem 4 covers Strategic Management, Digital Business Strategy, Cybersecurity for Managers, FinTech and Digital Payments, and Dissertation.

UPES's Digital Business specialisation is one of few Indian online MBA programmes that covers Cybersecurity for Managers as a dedicated business subject, addressing the growing demand for business leaders who understand digital risk alongside digital opportunity. Emerging Technologies in Business in Sem 3 covers AI, IoT, and blockchain from a business application perspective. The combination makes this specialisation well-suited for professionals targeting digital transformation, product management, and technology business leadership roles.

sem3Subjects.name: E-Commerce and Digital Business Models
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse platform business models, marketplace economics, D2C and B2B digital business design, and monetisation strategies for digital ventures.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Innovation and Transformation
sem3Subjects.description: Lead digital transformation programmes, manage innovation pipelines, and apply design thinking to digital product and process redesign.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Consumer Experience
sem3Subjects.description: Map digital customer journeys, design UX-driven product experiences, and manage omnichannel consumer touchpoints for digital-first businesses.

sem3Subjects.name: Social Media Strategy and Analytics
sem3Subjects.description: Design platform-specific social media strategies, manage content calendars, and apply social analytics to campaign performance and audience insights.

sem3Subjects.name: Emerging Technologies in Business
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate AI, IoT, blockchain, and cloud computing applications for business transformation and digital product development decisions.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem4Subjects.description: Develop digital-led competitive strategy, evaluate digital platform positioning, and design technology investment roadmaps for business growth.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Business Strategy
sem4Subjects.description: Build digital go-to-market strategies, manage platform ecosystems, and design data monetisation models for digitally native and transforming businesses.

sem4Subjects.name: Cybersecurity for Managers
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate digital risk frameworks, manage cybersecurity governance, and build organisational security culture for business and technology leadership roles.

sem4Subjects.name: FinTech and Digital Payments
sem4Subjects.description: Analyse digital payment infrastructure, evaluate fintech business models, and manage digital financial product development for technology and BFSI roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Dissertation
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied digital business research project on platform strategy, digital transformation ROI, or technology-led business model innovation.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all UPES MBA specialisations. Core includes Managerial Economics, Accounting for Managers, Marketing Management, Quantitative Techniques, Operations Management, OB and HRM, Project Management, Financial Management, Research Methodology, and Business Analytics for Managers.

whoHires.body:
Digital Business MBA graduates from UPES Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** E-commerce, IT product and services, EdTech, FinTech, Digital marketing agencies, Technology consulting

**Entry-level roles:** Digital Business Analyst, Product Analyst, E-Commerce Executive, Digital Transformation Analyst, Growth Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Product Manager, Digital Transformation Manager, E-Commerce Manager, Digital Business Development Manager, Technology Consulting Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Chief Digital Officer, Head of Digital Business, VP Product, Director Digital Transformation, Head of E-Commerce

**Top hiring organisations (UPES alumni placements):** TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro, Deloitte, KPMG, and technology product and e-commerce companies. UPES NIRF #36 Management ranking and UGC-DEB approval give Digital Business graduates corporate credibility for technology business leadership roles in North India IT corridors.

skills.body:
The UPES Digital Business specialisation builds skills that technology, e-commerce, and digital consulting employers test at product manager and digital transformation manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- E-Commerce and Digital Business Models: platform business model design, marketplace economics, and D2C strategy for e-commerce and digital product management roles
- Digital Consumer Experience: customer journey mapping, UX product thinking, and omnichannel experience design for product management and digital marketing roles
- Cybersecurity for Managers: digital risk governance, cybersecurity policy management, and security-by-design thinking for technology leadership roles. A dedicated business subject uncommon in peer online MBAs at this fee range
- FinTech and Digital Payments: digital payment infrastructure, fintech business model evaluation, and digital financial product development

**Applied skills:**
- Digital Innovation and Transformation: digital transformation programme leadership, innovation pipeline management, and design thinking application to technology-led business change
- Emerging Technologies in Business: AI, IoT, blockchain, and cloud computing business application evaluation for technology investment and product roadmap decisions

**Soft skills:** Presenting digital transformation business cases to boards, managing technology vendor relationships, communicating digital product roadmaps to cross-functional teams, and building stakeholder alignment for digital change initiatives.

comparisons.body:
Comparing UPES Online MBA Digital Business against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Digital Business:** Amity carries NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 recognition at Rs 2,25,000 with strong all-India brand. UPES Digital Business at Rs 1,75,000 includes Cybersecurity for Managers and FinTech and Digital Payments as dedicated Sem 4 subjects, adding a digital risk and financial technology dimension. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking is stronger than Amity's management category performance.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Digital Business:** NMIMS carries strong Mumbai technology company brand recognition. For Mumbai tech and consulting careers, NMIMS is the stronger choice. UPES Digital Business at Rs 1,75,000 with NIRF #36 Management ranking is competitive for North India IT services, e-commerce, and digital transformation roles where UPES alumni networks are active.

**vs MUJ Online MBA Digital Business:** MUJ is NAAC A+ at Rs 1,53,000-1,80,000 with Coursera Plus certifications. UPES Digital Business includes Cybersecurity for Managers as a dedicated subject not in MUJ's standard curriculum. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking is stronger than MUJ's management category standing.

fees.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Digital Business has a total program fee of Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years (4 semesters).

**Year-wise fee schedule:**
- Year 1 (Semesters 1 and 2): Rs 95,000
- Year 2 (Semesters 3 and 4): Rs 80,000

**Zero-cost EMI (no-cost EMI available):**
- Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months
- Tenure options: 3 to 36 months
- Zero interest (0% cost EMI) through UPES NBFC lending tie-ups
- Contact our counsellor for current tenure options and approval terms

**Scholarships available (confirmed from UPES scholarships portal):**
- **Academic/Work Experience scholarship**: 10% for 3+ years experience with 55%+ graduation marks; 15% for 5+ years experience; 20% for 10+ years experience
- **Alumni scholarship**: 20% for UPES degree programme graduates
- **Vijay (Sports) scholarship**: 35% to 100% based on national/international achievement level
- Scholarships cannot be combined with corporate MOU discounts
- Scholarship benefit applied semester-wise; eligibility confirmed at admission

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with UPES each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) and carries the UPES name with the MBA designation. The Digital Business specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India. UPES is WES recognised, making the degree suitable for international credential evaluation.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from UPES Online MBA Digital Business alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Aakash Verma
items.liked: Cybersecurity for Managers was unique and directly applicable to my digital product role. E-Commerce and Digital Business Models subject gave strong platform strategy frameworks I used in a product manager interview.
items.disliked: FinTech subject depth could be stronger for those targeting core fintech product roles rather than general digital business.
items.body: I had 5 years in IT services project management and the UPES Digital Business MBA helped me transition to a product manager role at a Gurgaon e-commerce startup. NIRF #36 in Management was a strong credential.

items.name: Nidhi Joshi
items.liked: Digital Consumer Experience and Social Media Strategy were well-structured. Digital Innovation and Transformation gave good frameworks for digital project leadership.
items.disliked: For South India tech company careers, UPES brand recognition is limited compared to NMIMS or JAIN Bengaluru. Self-sourcing was required for digital roles outside North India.
items.body: Good programme for North India digital transformation and product careers. The Cybersecurity for Managers subject was a differentiator in interviews. UPES alumni in Delhi NCR digital corridor were helpful.

items.name: Siddharth Rawat
items.liked: Emerging Technologies subject gave useful AI and blockchain business application frameworks. Digital Business Strategy was well-structured for startup scenarios.
items.disliked: Some faculty lacked hands-on digital product experience. Assignment quality checks could be tighter.
items.body: Solid digital business credential at Rs 1,75,000. NIRF #36 Management ranking is a genuine differentiator in North India. Best for digital transformation, product, and e-commerce careers in Uttarakhand and Delhi NCR.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for UPES Online MBA Digital Business?
faqs.answer: The total program fee is Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years. Year 1 is Rs 95,000 and Year 2 is Rs 80,000. Zero-cost EMI is available at Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months. Reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before payment.

faqs.question: Does UPES MBA Digital Business cover Cybersecurity?
faqs.answer: Yes. Cybersecurity for Managers is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering digital risk frameworks, cybersecurity governance, and security-by-design for business leadership. This is uncommon as a standalone management subject in Indian online MBA Digital Business programmes at this fee range.

faqs.question: What scholarships does UPES offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES offers Academic/Work Experience scholarship (10% for 3+ years, 15% for 5+ years, 20% for 10+ years experience with 55%+ graduation), Alumni scholarship (20%), and Vijay Sports scholarship (35% to 100%). Eligibility confirmed at admission.

faqs.question: Is UPES Digital Business MBA suitable for product management careers?
faqs.answer: Yes. The combination of E-Commerce and Digital Business Models, Digital Consumer Experience, Emerging Technologies, and Digital Business Strategy covers the core business and product thinking skills for product manager transitions. UPES NIRF #36 Management ranking supports credibility in technology company interviews.

faqs.question: How does UPES Digital Business compare to Amity or MUJ online MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES Digital Business includes Cybersecurity for Managers and FinTech and Digital Payments as dedicated subjects not common in Amity or MUJ digital business tracks. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking (2025) is stronger than both Amity's and MUJ's management category standings. At Rs 1,75,000, UPES is a competitive choice for North India digital business careers.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A, NIRF #36 Management digital business MBA covering Cybersecurity for Managers and FinTech at Rs 1,75,000.
You are targeting product management, digital transformation, or e-commerce roles in North India IT services or technology companies.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month and WES-recognised degree credentials.
consider: If South India IT or startup ecosystem access is the priority, JAIN Online MBA Digital Business from Bengaluru provides stronger South India industry connect.
If AI-driven digital transformation is the focus, JAIN AI for Finance or Data Science and AI specialisations deliver deeper applied AI curriculum.
If pan-India e-commerce brand management is the goal, NMIMS Online MBA Digital Business carries stronger Mumbai consumer company recognition.
